name: Emigrant Return — Departure Tax, Deemed Disposition, and HBP Collapse
description: Complete Julian Baptiste's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. He permanently emigrated to France on September 30, 2024. His tax documents and situational details are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\baptiste\. Save the completed return as 'julian_baptiste.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4058 (Non-Residents and Income Tax) and ITA s.128.1
metadata.key_complexity: Part-year resident; Date of Departure entry; T1243 Deemed Disposition of property; HBP unpaid balance inclusion on emigration; exclusion of post-departure foreign income
